scripts.test: npm run cleanup:hosts && E2E_PORT=5010 playwright test
scripts.test:headed: npm run cleanup:hosts && E2E_PORT=5010 playwright test --headed
scripts.test:ui: npm run cleanup:hosts && E2E_PORT=5010 playwright test --ui
scripts.test:debug: npm run cleanup:hosts && E2E_PORT=5010 playwright test --debug
scripts.test:mobile: npm run cleanup:hosts && E2E_PORT=5110 playwright test --project=mobile --project=tablet
scripts.test:desktop: npm run cleanup:hosts && E2E_PORT=5111 playwright test --project=desktop
scripts.test:showcase:data: npm run cleanup:hosts && E2E_SHOWCASE_PORT=5135 playwright test -c playwright.showcase.config.ts
scripts.test:ci: npm run cleanup:hosts && E2E_PORT=5120 playwright test --reporter=line
scripts.test:ci:prepared: npm run install:browsers && npm run test:ci
